prompt: Pause the strategy, preserve the record, alert legal and compliance, and prepare a self-report path instead of continuing the trading play.
summary: Divergence: instead of continuing the trading play, Tim Belden instructs the Portland desk to pause all trading related to the California matter, preserve all electronic records, notify Legal and Compliance, and prepare a self-report. The Portland desk acknowledges, implements holds and forensic snapshots, and commits to a self-report draft for review.

messages.subject: URGENT - Pause trading, preserve records, notify Legal/Compliance
messages.body_text: Do not continue or execute any trading plays related to California power. Immediately pause all trading activity, preserve all electronic records (do not delete emails, database entries, files, spreadsheets, calendars, or other electronic data), and begin forensic snapshots where possible. Alert Legal and Compliance now and request immediate guidance. Prepare a self-report path: draft a concise summary of actions taken, list of affected trades/accounts and timestamps, and chain-of-custody steps. Send the draft to me and Legal for review within 2 hours. Confirm receipt.
messages.rationale: Direct intervention to halt trading in response to the California AG order, ensure evidence preservation, and escalate to Legal/Compliance while initiating a self-report.

messages.subject: RE: URGENT - Acknowledged: Pausing activity and preserving records
messages.body_text: Acknowledged. We have halted related trading activity and applied retention holds on relevant mailboxes and databases. Initiating forensic snapshots of mailboxes, servers, trading logs, and calendars now. Notifying Legal and Compliance and requesting immediate support. We will prepare a self-report draft (timeline, affected trades, authorizations, custody steps) and deliver to you and Legal within 90 minutes. Will confirm when snapshots are complete.
messages.rationale: Confirm immediate preservation and escalation steps and commit to producing a self-report within a short, actionable timeline.

top_subjects: RE: URGENT - Acknowledged: Pausing activity and preserving records
URGENT - Pause trading, preserve records, notify Legal/Compliance
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
